channel.title: Comments on: Dogfish Head 120 IPA, Ep. 60
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: dave@Classic
item.dc:creator: dave@Classic
item.description: i work at a beverage store on long island and we've been trying to get this stuff in for a couple of years now with no luck :( but well keep trying. im starting to feel like its a unicorn, you here about it but never see one.
item.content:encoded: i work at a beverage store on long island and we’ve been trying to get this stuff in for a couple of years now with no luck 🙁 but well keep trying. im starting to feel like its a unicorn, you here about it but never see one.

item.title: By: Hanger18
item.dc:creator: Hanger18
item.description: Great brew I actually prefer the 90 min. but I can really appreciate this beer.
item.content:encoded: Great brew I actually prefer the 90 min. but I can really appreciate this beer.

item.title: By: David Little
item.dc:creator: David Little
item.description: It was the 120 talking Chris. I promise.
item.content:encoded: It was the 120 talking Chris. I promise.

item.title: By: Ryan
item.dc:creator: Ryan
item.description: I also cellered one that I will keep there for a couple of years :)
item.content:encoded: I also cellered one that I will keep there for a couple of years 🙂

item.title: By: Ryan
item.dc:creator: Ryan
item.description: I got this beer in March when I went to Florida. This is an amazing beer. I thought it was going to be hard to drink and it really wasn't. Dogfish does an amazing job with their beers. Recently I got Raison D'Extra when I was in Chicago, now that beer I couldn't finish.
item.content:encoded: I got this beer in March when I went to Florida. This is an amazing beer. I thought it was going to be hard to drink and it really wasn’t. Dogfish does an amazing job with their beers. Recently I got Raison D’Extra when I was in Chicago, now that beer I couldn’t finish.

item.title: By: SteveA
item.dc:creator: SteveA
item.description: Yep, the 120 Minute is dry-hopped every day for 30 days.
item.content:encoded: Yep, the 120 Minute is dry-hopped every day for 30 days.

item.title: By: Chris Lady
item.dc:creator: Chris Lady
item.description:
David,
Did you call me a monkey? If so, I will have words with you later.
item.content:encoded:
David,

Did you call me a monkey? If so, I will have words with you later.
